title: hedyotis schlechtendahliana subsp. waimeae
intro: Hedyotis schlechtendahliana subsp. waimeae, also known as Waimea hedyotis or Waimea button flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a small, perennial herb native to Hawaii, with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, Waimea hedyotis is prepared as a tea or infusion, and may also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures, capsules, or topical applications.
